'''sharodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebollite|cebollite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebollite|cebollite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sharodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæredheth|shæredheth]] || [[word:shæredhej|shæredhej]] || [[word:shæredhesh|shæredhesh]] || [[word:shæredhe|shæredhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sharorodhoth|sharorodhoth]] || [[word:sharorodhoj|sharorodhoj]] || [[word:sharorodhosh|sharorodhosh]] || [[word:sharorodho|sharorodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sharodhoth|sharodhoth]] || [[word:sharodhoj|sharodhoj]] || [[word:sharodhosh|sharodhosh]] || [[word:sharodho|sharodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sharofdhoth|sharofdhoth]] || [[word:sharofdhoj|sharofdhoj]] || [[word:sharofdhosh|sharofdhosh]] || [[word:sharofdhof|sharofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sharodhotho|sharodhotho]] || [[word:sharodhojo|sharodhojo]] || [[word:sharodhosho|sharodhosho]] || [[word:sharodhoko|sharodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sharodhoth|sharodhoth]] || [[word:sharodhoj|sharodhoj]] || [[word:sharodhosh|sharodhosh]] || [[word:sharodho|sharodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sharodhothol|sharodhothol]] || [[word:sharodhojol|sharodhojol]] || [[word:sharodhoshol|sharodhoshol]] || [[word:sharodhokol|sharodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sharodhothotho|sharodhothotho]] || [[word:sharodhojojo|sharodhojojo]] || [[word:sharodhoshosho|sharodhoshosho]] || [[word:sharodhoko|sharodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sharodhothon|sharodhothon]] || [[word:sharodhojon|sharodhojon]] || [[word:sharodhoshon|sharodhoshon]] || [[word:sharodhokon|sharodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sharodhothoro|sharodhothoro]] || [[word:sharodhojoro|sharodhojoro]] || [[word:sharodhoshoro|sharodhoshoro]] || [[word:sharodhokoro|sharodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
